title: saussurea uniflora var. uniflora
intro: Saussurea uniflora var. uniflora, also known as the one-flowered saussurea, is a type of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a traditional medicinal plant used in various cultures for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal medicine, Saussurea uniflora var. uniflora is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in the form of tinctures and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
